step_by_step_thinking:
Which of the following drugs used for management of preterm labor also has neuroprotective roles in the fetus?
A: MgSO4 - Correct option according to multiple articles indicating its role in preventing cerebral palsy.
B: Nifedipine - While useful for tocolysis, it doesn't appear to have direct neuroprotective benefits highlighted here.
C: Ritodrine - Not listed as having any specific neuroprotective properties.
D: Isoxuprine - No mention of it playing a role in neuroprotection.
raw_response:

\boxed{A}
